title: calamagrostis ophitidis
intro: Calamagrostis ophitidis, also known as Ophioglossum grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis ophitidis include its ability to help with wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal preparations such as salves and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
